author: stephendolan
description: Sync your current note with a relevant calendar event.

manifest.author: Stephen Dolan
manifest.description: Sync a relevant calendar event to your current note.
manifest.name: Calendar Event Sync

name: Calendar Event Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixed
- Settings changes now take effect immediately without reloading Obsidian
- Calendar fetch includes 10-second timeout to prevent UI hangs
- Empty ICS URL now shows clear error instead of confusing fetch failure

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changed
- Simplified time constants and event modal logic
- Inlined premature abstractions for better readability
- Added project documentation

releases.author: stephendolan
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Testing Infrastructure
- Added Vitest with 59 comprehensive tests covering CalendarEvent, CalendarService, and recurring event expansion
- Created Obsidian API mock for testing

### Bug Fixes
- **Critical**: Fixed JSON cloning that broke Date objects in recurring events
- **High**: Fixed NaN propagation from invalid settings input (now falls back to defaults)
- **High**: Fixed modal callback errors being silently swallowed (now shows user notice)
- **High**: Added error handling for network failures and malformed ICS data
- **Medium**: Added try/catch for invalid RRULE patterns (logs warning, continues processing)

### Dependencies
- Updated node-ical 0.19.0 → 0.22.1 (fixes 8 security vulnerabilities including 1 critical)
- Updated TypeScript 4.7.4 → 5.7.3
- Updated esbuild 0.17.3 → 0.27.1
- Updated @types/node to v24
- Removed unused ESLint dependencies

### Configuration
- Updated tsconfig to ES2018 target with esModuleInterop
- Updated esbuild config for node: prefixed module support

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixed

- At some point, titles lost the prefixing 📆, which is nice for plugins like [Auto Note Mover](obsidian://show-plugin?id=auto-note-mover). It's back, and includes the date before the event summary.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Recurring events with overrides to their summary or time weren't being taken into account.
- Recurring events were not always respecting user timezones.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Added better handling for overriding the `Attendees` block regardless of inner content
- Added a default attendee message for when ICS URLs don't include the attendees in event details

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Summary

This 2.0 release adds a new "Select modal" option that will give you the choice of many events, in case you want to prep for a future meeting or capture notes from a past meeting.

## Added
- A new command for selecting from a list of recent/future events

## Fixed
- Lots of logic that would cause event selection to fail in previous versions

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stephendolan/obsidian-calendar-event-sync/compare/1.0.6...2.0.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Minor edits for publishing to plugin directory.

- Removed setting to hide notices entirely
- Renamed settings
- Removed top-level settings heading
- Set for desktop only
